Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a Long edge as their home edge. Both sides should have the same number of units. If you are using the BV system, each side should have an equal allotment of points (BV).
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.

Tracks.setup: The Attacker selects a Long edge as their home edge.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The defending player sets up his units using the Hidden Units rules. Defending units may be placed anywhere on the map, except for clear and paved hexes.

Tracks.setup: The attacking player attempts to extract a target. After the players roll dice and select their home map edges, the attacker secretly chooses a target hex for the extraction.
Tracks.setupAtt: The attacker then writes down the target hex's number and mapsheet name on a slip of paper, putting it somewhere safe
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: Carry extraction target off Attacker's Home edge
Tracks.secondaryObjAttk: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Defender's force
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Attacker's force

Tracks.setup: The attacking player's forces have become trapped behind enemy lines. To reach safety, the units must cross the map and break through the defender's forces.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender's force deploys up to the half way line from their Home edge.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: All Attacker's units escape off Defenders Home Edge.
Tracks.secondaryObjAttk: Over 50 percent Attacker's units escape off Defenders Home Edge.
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Attacker's force

Tracks.setup: The attacker's forces must race across the map to reach their DropShip before a larger force of pursuing defenders can reach them. Set the defender's force at twice the size of the attacking force.
Tracks.setupAtt: During Turn 1, attacking units may enter and move unopposed per standard rules. The defending units enter during the Movement Phase of Turn 2, from the same map edge as the attacking units.
Tracks.setupDef: The defending player does not deploy his forces until Turn 2.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: All Attacker's units escape in dropship.
Tracks.secondaryObjAttk: Over 50 percent Attacker's units escape in dropship.
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Attacker's force

Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a short edge as their home edge, and the Attacker gets the opposite short edge as their home edge.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender holds up to 25 percent of their force off the map at the start of the track. The remainder of their units are deployed prior to Initiative within 12 hexes of their home edge. The held units are placed anywhere on the Defender's half of the play area after the completion of the Movement Phase of Turn 1 as if they had moved 0 hexes or used standstill movement.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: Destroy/Cripple at Least 75 percent of the Defender's force
Tracks.primaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at Least 75 percent of the Attacker's force
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: At the end of Turn 8, have at least 50 percent of the Defender's unit survive and be within 4 hexes of the center line of the battlefield
Tracks.Notes: See Mercenaries booklet for Full details

Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a short edge as their home edge, and the Attacker gets the opposite short edge as their home edge.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker enters the battlefield from the Attacker's home edge during the Movement Phase of Turn 1. Attacking units may only exit via home edge; exiting via any other edge for any reason counts as unit destruction.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender enters the battlefield from the Defender's home edge during the Movement Phase of Turn 1. Defending units may only exit via home edge; exiting via any other edge for any reason counts as unit destruction.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: The first team that destroys or cripples half of the opponent's force. Units that voluntarily withdraw from the map count as destroyed or crippled for this objective.
Tracks.primaryObjDef: The first team that destroys or cripples half of the opponent's force. Units that voluntarily withdraw from the map count as destroyed or crippled for this objective.
Tracks.Notes: See Mercenaries booklet for Full details

Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a short edge as their home edge, and the Attacker gets the opposite short edge as their home edge. The Defender designates (or places if the map has no appropriate buildings already) 4 Medium buildings within 3 hexes of the center of the battlefield. The buildings take 30 damage before being destroyed and are immobile (−4 Target Number modifier).
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker enters half of their force from their home edge at the start of the track. The remainder of the force enters from an edge perpendicular to the home edge during the Movement Phase of Turn 2.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender deploys their entire force prior to Initiative anywhere on their half of the battlefield. At least 50 percent must be within 3 hexes of the designated buildings. Secretly designate one of these buildings as headquarters before the start of the track.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: Locate (using Scanning) and destroy the headquarters building.
Tracks.secondaryObjAttk: Destroy/ Cripple at least 50 percent of the opponent's force.
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: Destroy/ Cripple at least 50 percent of the opponent's force.
Tracks.Notes: See Mercenaries booklet for Full details

Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a short edge as their home edge, and the Attacker gets the opposite short edge as their home edge. The Defender will place/ designate 6 Medium buildings (any height) within 10 hexes of the center of the battlefield.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender begins the track with all units in the playing area. At least half of the Defender's force must be within 6 hexes of the designated buildings. Before the start of the track, the Defender designates 2 of the 6 buildings as the objectives.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: Attacker must carry 1 component per unit in their force off the board.
Tracks.primaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at least 75 percent of the opponent's force.
Tracks.Notes: Inpired by Mercenaries book, can alternatively us the full Track details. Advised to use loading rules.

Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a long edge as their home edge, and the Attacker gets the opposite long edge as their home edge. Each player may withdraw units to their home edge at any time.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: Have less percent destroyed/crippled units than Defender.
Tracks.secondaryObjAttk: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Defender's force
Tracks.primaryObjDef: Have less percent destroyed/crippled units than Attacker.
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Attacker's force
Tracks.Notes: Mission inspired by Campaign Operations book

Tracks.setup: The Defender selects a long edge as their home edge, and the Attacker gets the opposite long edge as their home edge.
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track. The attacker's BV should be half that of the defender
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track. No defending units may withdraw from the map until at least a quarter of the defending Force has been destroyed.
Tracks.primaryObjAttk: Spot all Defending units. To spot a defending unit, an attacking unit must have LOS to it and be within 10 hexes.
Tracks.Notes: Mission inspired by Campaign Operations book

Tracks.setup: The defending player should place10 1-hex Medium standard buildings (CF 40) on the map, and a single 1-hex Hardened standard building (CF 120) representing the defender’s command post
Tracks.setupAtt: The Attacker's force enters from their home edge at the start of the track.
Tracks.setupDef: The Defender begins the track with all units in the playing area. At least half of the Defender's force must be within 6 hexes of the designated buildings.
Tracks.Notes: Mission inspired by Campaign Operations book

Tracks.setup: Defending player may chose a additional mech as their High Value Target (HVT). This extra unit is based on the average Tonnage or BV of their force (mechs and Vehicles). The HVT is not effected by Force Withdrawal, has a skill of Piloting 5 and Gunnery 4, will not eject and may not leave the field of battle.
Tracks.setupAtt: Attacker deploys within 3 hexes of their Home Edge
Tracks.setupDef: Defender picks their Home Edge. The force and their High Value Target (HVT) deploy within 3 hexes of their Home Edge
Tracks.secondaryObjAttk: Destroy/Cripple at Least 50 percent of the Defenders's force
Tracks.primaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple at Least 75 percent of the Attacker's force
Tracks.secondaryObjDef: Destroy/Cripple Attacker's Commander/Unit with highest BV
